title: Buy Now Pay Later Costs 45% More Than You Think
hook: That 'four easy payments' button just hijacked your wallet — and the numbers prove it.
angle: BNPL exploits mental accounting by fragmenting one large payment into four small ones, making spending feel trivial while average users quietly rack up $900+ in active loans across apps they've forgotten about.
audience: 20-35 year-olds who use Klarna, Afterpay, or Affirm for everyday purchases
key_numbers: BNPL users spend 45% more per transaction vs paying in full
Average active BNPL balance across apps: $940
34% of BNPL users missed at least one payment last year (fees up to $34 each)
